sections.paragraph:
in pause, בֶּכִי with suff. בִּכְיִי m.

(1) weeping, from בָּכָה, Gen 45:2 Isa 15:3 22:4 , etc. בָּכָה בְּכִי גָּדֹול “to make a great lamentation,” 2Sa 13:36 also a dropping, a distilling of water in mines, Job 28:11. Comp. flere, for rorare, stillare in Lucret. i. 350, Gr. δάκρυον and דִּמְעָה.
